💬 Get in touch

Contact ToolFocus

Have a question, spotted a bug, or want to suggest a new tool? We read every message and usually reply within 1–2 business days.

ToolFocus is owned and operated by Breakout Trade.

Or email directly: breakouttradeapp@gmail.com

Quick info

  • 👤Owned by Breakout Trade
  • ⏱️Reply within 1–2 business days
  • 🔒Your message is sent securely. We never share your email.
  • ✉️Direct: breakouttradeapp@gmail.com

Common questions

Are all tools really free?▼

Yes — every tool is free with no signup, trial, or hidden fees. Ads keep the lights on.

Is my data safe?▼

All tools run in your browser. Nothing you type is ever sent to our servers.

Can I request a new tool?▼

Absolutely! Choose "Feature request" and describe what you need. We build the most-requested tools first.

I found a bug — how do I report it?▼

Choose "Bug report" and include which tool was affected, what happened, and your browser/OS.
